content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad weakness across NIFTY (-0.85%), Bank Nifty (-0.86%), and Auto (-1.41%) with VIX at 16.84 indicating elevated uncertainty. However, IT and FMCG are showing defensive rotation strength (COFORGE +6.44%, DABUR +3.77%, TITAN +4.68%). Book has 11 of 15 positions on Day-0 (just entered), so primary focus is position management: trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.8%, COFORGE +9.3%) and protect against gap-down on losers. NUVAMA has Q4 results TODAY (binary event, Rule 11) plus active SEBI warning letter (Rule 13) - DISQUALIFIED. CPI print Tuesday adds macro caution.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL intact. SL 1073.10 is well-placed - locks in +9% gain. CMP 1080-1091 (pre-market). Q4 beat, brokerage upgrades to Rs 1,350 target. Trail-gap rule: SL at 1073 is ~1.5% below CMP 1091, within the 1% floor. Keep SL here, let runner run. No-op MODIFY avoided - using HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1073 already locks +9% gain. Trail-gap to CMP 1091 = 1.7%, fine. Brokerage targets Rs 1,350. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge intact - US-Iran tension, crude $104, weak rupee support gold. SL 121 = -3% buffer. CMP 124.31, target 135. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (revenue +22%, PAT +18%), record high Rs 843. CMP 831, SL at entry 820 = breakeven protection. Trail-gap 820 vs CMP 831 = 1.3%, within floor. Hold SL at breakeven, target 855. No-op - converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1320.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% unrealized. Pre-market +6.44% to 1368. Current SL 1352 sits ABOVE CMP intraday range risk - dropping to 1320 (still locks +4.8% gain, 3.5% below CMP 1368 - within 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 beat, $1.75B order book, brokerage targets Rs 1,430-2,020. Trail-gap discipline applied: previous 1352 vs CMP 1368 = only 1.2% buffer, too tight for IT volatility. Loosening would be rejected by guardrail (SL can only tighten). Actually 1352 > 1320 - this is a LOOSEN which guardrail will REJECT. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1352 cannot be loosened (guardrail). CMP 1368, SL 1352 = only 1.2% gap - tight for IT but acceptable as locked +7.4% gain. If stopped on intraday volatility, exit is at +7.4% - acceptable outcome. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1. CMP 3051 vs SL 3000 = 1.7% gap. India-Pakistan tensions support sector. Hold to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Record Q4 revenue, +0.05% today. SL 820 vs CMP 836 = 2% gap. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37.2%, EBITDA margin 23.2%. CMP 1476 (+1.77% today). SL 1465 = 1.7% below entry, tight 0.7% below CMP - but no panic, thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Day-0 carry. Neutral research, Q4 underperformed sector. CMP 1606 just above entry 1618 (-0.2%). SL 1580 = -2.3% from entry. Hold to SL or target 1740 (Zaynich USFDA optionality)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 +47%. Rs 2,300 cr refrigerants capex. SL 2755 vs CMP 2780 = 0.9% gap, tight but Day-0. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 revenue +27%, market share 30-31%, record dividend Rs 47/share. Citi target 10,500. SL 9020 vs CMP 9083 = 0.7% gap, tight but pre-market positive +0.89%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 EBITDA margin 27%, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. SL 1955 vs CMP 1989 = 1.7% gap. Hold to target 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target Rs 415 (~15% upside). SL 354 vs CMP 362 = 2.2% gap. BFSI weakness today is sector noise, not thesis-breaking. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, buyback at Rs 12,000, dividend Rs 150. Pre-market +1% on 3.1x volume in weak auto sector = relative strength signal. SL 10440 vs CMP 10711 = 2.5% gap. Hold to target 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +16%, raised FY27 guidance to low-double-digit. Pre-market +3.77% confirms FMCG rotation. SL 472 vs CMP 487 = 3% gap. Hold to target 510."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ATH but Q4 pending in May - binary event approaches. Kotak Sell target 800 vs CMP 1228. SL 1190 = -3% buffer. Monitor closely - if Q4 announcement date confirms within 3 sessions, revisit Rule 11 disposition. For now Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NUVAMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "REJECTED on Rule 11 (Q4 board meeting + results TODAY, May 11 - binary event) AND Rule 13 (SEBI administrative warning letter to subsidiary NWIL dated May 6, NSE 2 warning letters Apr 29 - active regulatory overhang unresolved). Despite +10.65% pre-market on 2.3x volume, governance + binary same-session combination disqualifies entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held - no add. Position sizing: 5 shares × 9100 = Rs 45,500 = 4.5% of capital, within bounds. Could add but Capital Goods cluster (POLYCAB held + BHARATFORG + GRSE) already at ~17% of capital. Cluster discipline applied - no add."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held - no add. FMCG cluster (MARICO + DABUR) is fine but Day-0 entry already captures DABUR exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held. BFSI cluster (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL) at ~21% capital - at cluster soft cap. No add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1073 locks +9% gain, trail-gap 1.7% vs CMP 1091. Brokerage upgrades flowing. Let it run to target 1135."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge. SL 121 = -3.4% buffer. Crude $104, US-Iran tensions support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat record-high. SL 820 = breakeven, locks downside risk at zero. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1352 cannot loosen. CMP 1368 = 1.2% gap. If stopped, exit at +7.4% - acceptable. Pre-market +6.44% suggests gap-up - let chart confirm direction post-open."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence FY26 PAT +41.8%, geopolitical tailwind. Day-0, SL -0.8% from entry. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Record Q4. SL 820 = +1.7% above entry, locks small gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-0, Q4 PAT +37%. CMP +1.77% today moving favorable. Hold to SL 1465 or target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-0 carry. Zaynich USFDA optionality. Respect SL 1580 per Rule 17 - no preemptive exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-0. Q4 beat, refrigerants capex. SL 2755 tight but planned at entry - respect it (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record, market share gains, dividend Rs 47. SL 9020 tight but Day-0 - respect entry SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. Day-0, SL -3% from entry. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. BFSI weakness today is noise. SL 354 = -3% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, buyback at 12,000. Pre-market +1% on 3.1x volume = relative strength in weak Auto sector. Hold to target 11260."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation confirmed by pre-market +3.77%. Q4 beat, raised guidance. Hold to target 510."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pharma defensive but Q4 pending. Kotak Sell flag noted. SL 1190 = -3% buffer protects downside. Monitor Q4 date - if within 3 sessions, trigger Rule 11 review."
    }

  "watchlist_notes": "NUVAMA: REJECTED on Rule 11+13 combo (same-day Q4 board + active SEBI/NSE warnings). POLYCAB/DABUR/CAMS: already held. THERMAX/FINCABLES/NBCC/TITAN/BERGEPAINT: not researched in depth this batch, BERGEPAINT has binary in 1 session (Rule 11 disqualified), THERMAX +11.84% pre-market is extended chase. INFY/HCLTECH/PERSISTENT: IT defensive theme already covered via COFORGE. SUNPHARMA/APOLLOHOSP: pharma already covered via WOCKPHARMA+LAURUSLABS. CRAFTSMAN/CARTRADE 15x/7.5x volume: would need block-deal/earnings catalyst verification before chase. PSUBNKBEES short: not aligned with current capacity/conviction.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day-22 of 180. Book 65% deployed across 15 positions, all Day-0 carry (just entered). Cash buffer 35% adequate. Day's job is pure position management - 11/15 positions are within 2% of SL which is normal Day-0 noise; Rule 17 mandates respecting entry SLs not panic-trimming. PNBHOUSING and COFORGE are the runners (+9.8%/+9.3%) - SLs already protect material gain. Pre-market signals: IT and FMCG defensive rotation favors COFORGE/MARICO/DABUR; Auto weakness is risk for BAJAJ-AUTO but its 3.1x volume + positive print is relative strength. CPI print Tuesday + NUVAMA same-day results + general broad weakness justifies CAUTIOUS bias on new entries. Pending HFCL BUY order (7464m old = 5+ days) should be reviewed - keeping it pending for now since limit was at 133.50 below current market action."
}
